market_summary: REGIME: Risk-Off lean sustained — SPY mom=+4.36% but 1m=-2.01% and below MA50; QQQ 1m=-0.99%, 3m=-3.69%, below MA50; IWM 1m=-3.70%, below MA50. All three major equity benchmarks below 50-day MAs confirms near-term distribution. TLT 1m=+2.56%, above both MAs — bond bid intact, flight-to-quality posture. BTC-USD mom=-27.86%, 3m=-27.83%, below both MAs — crypto fully risk-off. Regime: MIXED/DEFENSIVE. Commodity metals (GLD mom=+36.81%, above both MAs) and defense (LMT mom=+40.50%, above both MAs) remain the only clean dual-momentum + low-drawdown pockets.

LEADERSHIP: Portfolio composite momentum ~28% weighted avg vs SPY mom=+4.36% — significant alpha spread maintained. LMT leads at mom=+40.50%, 3m=+51.14%, dd63=-5.23%, above both MAs — strongest quality/momentum combination in portfolio. GLD mom=+36.81%, 3m=+22.39%, above both MAs at 20% weight — dominant macro hedge. KLAC mom=+39.44% but below MA50, dd63=-22.41% and vol20=48.93% — momentum strong but elevated risk. TSM mom=+37.59%, 3m=+15.01%, above MA200 but below MA50, dd63=-12.60%. XOM mom=+29.32%, 3m=+29.22%, above both MAs, dd63=-5.48% — cleanest energy compounder. CVX mom=+21.74%, above both MAs, vol20=17.06% — lowest-volatility holding. LLY remains the watch name: 1m=-10.40%, 3m=-4.02%, below MA50 at $1045.90, but above MA200 at $878.37, vol20=31.79%, dd63=-11.12%; FY2026 EPS est $34.66, FY2027 $41.85, FY2028 $52.14 — secular GLP-1 quality intact but near-term momentum headwind. XLI mom=+13.16%, 3m=+10.58%, above both MAs, dd63=-5.01% — defensive industrials ballast.

GO/NO-GO: NON-REBALANCE DAY — Rebalance due = false (Day 5 since last checkpoint 2026-03-04; 7-day minimum cadence; next eligible window 2026-03-11). Qualitative refresh confirms: LLY Q4-2025 EPS $7.39 actual, FY2025 gross margin 83%, ROE 78%, ROIC 46% — quality anchor fundamentally intact despite price softness. KLAC FY2026-Q2 EPS $8.73 actual; FY2026 annual est $36.56, FY2027 $46.28, FY2028 $53.88; operating margin 43.3%, ROIC 40.4% — earnings acceleration confirmed. LMT Q4-2025 EPS $5.80 actual; FY2026 est $29.81, FY2027 $32.20, FY2028 $34.74; FCF yield 6.2%, earnings growth +19.5% YoY — defense rearmament thesis intact. XOM Q4-2025 EPS $1.54 with TTM FCF/share $5.60, P/E=17.6x, FCF yield 4.7% — value anchor solid. No emergency kill-switch breaches across any holding. Portfolio holds unchanged.

1w=-11.81% sharp weekly drawdown; below MA50 ($1435.30); dd63=-22.41% elevated; vol20=48.93% — highest portfolio volatility. Positioned for potential semi capex cycle softness. Watch for MA50 reclaim; if dd63 extends toward -30%, evaluate sizing trim.

thesis: NON-REBALANCE DAY: Process discipline enforced. Day 5 post-2026-03-04 rebalance checkpoint; 7-day minimum cadence requires next eligible window no earlier than 2026-03-11. No emergency invalidation conditions breached across any of the 8 holdings. Portfolio composite momentum (~28% weighted avg) materially exceeds SPY benchmark (+4.36%).

PORTFOLIO HEALTH SOLID WITH WATCHES: All 8 holdings above emergency thresholds. LMT (mom=+40.50%, 3m=+51.14%, dd63=-5.23%, above both MAs, FY2026 EPS est $29.81 with +19.5% YoY earnings growth, FCF yield 6.2%) is the highest-conviction holding — defense rearmament thesis structurally intact. GLD (mom=+36.81%, 3m=+22.39%, above both MAs) remains dominant macro hedge at 20% weight. KLAC fundamentals confirmed strong: operating margin 43.3%, ROIC 40.4%, FY2026 EPS est $36.56 accelerating to $53.88 by FY2028 — but 1w=-11.81% and dd63=-22.41% demand monitoring. LLY gross margin 83%, ROE 78%, ROIC 46%, FY2028 EPS est $52.14 — quality anchor, but below MA50 and 3m=-4.02% is a watchlist flag.

WATCHLIST FOR NEXT REBALANCE (Mar 11+): (1) LLY — if 1m momentum does not begin recovering toward MA50 ($1045.90) and price dips toward $960 kill-switch, evaluate trim from 10% to 5% or replacement with defensive quality compounder. (2) KLAC — if dd63 extends beyond -28% or MA200 ($1108.64) threatened, consider sizing reduction. (3) SLV (mom=+74.93%, 3m=+43.09%) is the standout candidate for next rebalance — extreme momentum but vol20=83% and dd63=-37.15% demand careful sizing; XLI replacement candidate if regime stays defensive. No other replacement candidates clear combined quality+momentum+risk hurdle over current 8-name portfolio.
risks: MACRO: SPY and all three equity benchmarks below MA50 — broadening distribution could pressure cyclical/energy names (XOM, CVX, XLI). Tariff escalation or USD strength headwind for TSM (Taiwan geopolitical premium) and GLD (USD inverse). TLT bid (+2.56% 1m) consistent with growth-scare scenario that could compress energy earnings estimates if oil demand weakens.

IDIOSYNCRATIC: LLY is primary watch — close $990.33 vs MA50 $1045.90, 1m=-10.40%. Kill-switch $960; if breached before Mar 11 window, emergency review warranted. KLAC dd63=-22.41% with 1w=-11.81% acute selloff — if semiconductor capex guidance weakens or AI spending concerns deepen, drawdown could extend. LMT 3m=+51.14% run is extended at 22.3x P/E with payout ratio 61.9% — any DoD budget cut or geopolitical de-escalation could trigger mean reversion.

EXECUTION/LIQUIDITY: No major binary events pre-positioned against. Cost of doing nothing (zero slippage, zero turnover) clearly exceeds marginal alpha of any tactical adjustment today. Round-trip slippage ~30-40bps per trade; with no thesis damage breaching kill-switch thresholds, holding is the dominant strategy. Next eligible decision point: 2026-03-11 at earliest.

trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base case: Non-rebalance day, no emergency conditions, process discipline enforced. Portfolio composite momentum (~28% weighted avg) materially exceeds SPY benchmark (+4.36%). Round-trip slippage cost (~30-40bps per trade) exceeds any marginal alpha from tactical adjustment with no thesis damage. Bull case: LMT defense rearmament (NATO 3%+ GDP targets, Ukraine conflict), KLAC/TSM AI semiconductor capex cycle, XOM/CVX energy supply discipline, and GLD safe-haven/inflation flows all continue to compound into next window. Bear case: Growth scare deepens, SPY breaks MA200, LLY/KLAC drawdowns accelerate — GLD 20% sleeve and XLI/CVX lower-vol positions provide ballast. Expected edge of holding clearly exceeds cost of action; next decision point is 2026-03-11 at earliest.
